ValidationRule.description: Because Credit Insurance Confirmation is Selected , Confirmation Bank English Name cannot be empty!
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: IF( AND(RecordType.DeveloperName ='LC', Credit_Insurance_Confirmation_Y_N__c =True,ISBLANK( Confirmation_Bank_English_Name__c )), TRUE, FALSE)
ValidationRule.errorMessage: There is the Credit Insurance Confirmation,Confirmation Bank English Name Cannot be Empty!
